prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `40f6cd08`.
codex_response:
Implemented `40f6cd08` as: find the one decorated solid rectangle, extract its visible nested subrectangles as edge-margin specs, and repaint that same layer sequence into every other solid rectangle with the same base color. The Opus summary matched the official examples, the Sonnet file had no entry, so I used the Opus hint and did not need a `notes.md`. No new reusable primitive was needed.

**Files**
The task package is wired in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_40f6cd08/__init__.py#L1), the verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_40f6cd08/verifier.py#L12), the task-local extraction/application helpers are in [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_40f6cd08/helpers.py#L19), and the generator is in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_40f6cd08/generator.py#L91). The generator stays close to the task family by producing 2-3 separated solid rectangles and using only the centered, left-anchored, and bottom-anchored nested-rectangle motifs seen in the official task.

**Validation**
`conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 40f6cd08` passed `4/4` official examples. `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 40f6cd08 --n-examples 1000` built the artifacts, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 40f6cd08` passed `1000/1000` generated examples.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/40f6cd08/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/40f6cd08/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/40f6cd08/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/40f6cd08/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/40f6cd08/previews/preview_03.png). No terminal image renderer was available here, so the final sanity check was done by inspecting representative generated grids directly after build.
